descriptionHtml:
Bali 4.6 For Sale 2023 | 5 Guest Cabins + 2 Crew Cabins | Tax Not Paid

The Bali 4.6 For Sale 2023 presents an appealing opportunity for anyone seeking a spacious, contemporary catamaran with thoughtful design elements and a practical suite of equipment. Currently sailing under the Greek flag, this vessel offers comfort, reliability, and is in good condition, making her ready for immediate use. Built in 2023, she integrates generous living spaces with modern technology, ideal for cruising in the Mediterranean or further afield.

Specifications:

  • Boat Type: Catamaran, mainsail (battened)
  • Year of Built: 2023
  • Cabins: 5 + 2
  • Heads: 4
  • Flag: Greek
  • VAT Status: Not Paid
  • LOA (Length Overall): 14.28 m
  • Beam: 7.66 m
  • Draft: 1.22 m
  • Displacement: Not specified
  • Fuel Tank Capacity: 800 lt
  • Water Tank Capacity: 800 lt
  • Engines: 2 x Yanmar, 57 hp each, double alternators
  • Engine Hours: 1,345 (as of April 2025)
  • Generator: Onan 11 KWA, 1,779 hours (April 2025)
  • Air Conditioning: Yes
  • Water Maker: Yes
  • Solar Panels: Yes
  • Deck Cushions: Brand new custom Sunbrella
  • Steering Wheels: 1
  • Navigation Instruments: Raymarine (autopilot, GPS, plotter)
  • Electric Toilets: Yes
  • Electric Fridge: Yes
  • Sound System: Fusion Hi Fi
  • Bimini: Yes
  • Deck Shower: Yes
  • Dinghy and Outboard: Included

In summary, the Bali 4.6 For Sale 2023 is a practical, well-equipped and spacious catamaran, in good condition and ready for her next voyage. To arrange an inspection or for more details, contact the seller for this professionally maintained Greek-flagged catamaran.
